span.p: Need to pick a model for a coding task

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cheapest fast tier
Copilot: completion/fast model · Codex: Codex-Spark · Grok: smallest/fast variant

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Long autonomous run?
multi-step / multi-hour agent, unsupervised

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Coding-agent tier
Copilot: coding-agent models · Codex: GPT-5.3-Codex / GPT-5-Codex · Grok: flagship long-context

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Genuinely hard reasoning?
system design / rare debugging / eval rubrics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Top frontier, accept the cost
Copilot: Opus/GPT-5.x top · Codex: GPT-5.5-Pro · Grok: flagship

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Balanced default
Copilot: Auto / Sonnet-class · Codex: GPT-5.5 · Grok: Grok 4.3
